content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


August 29, 2002


Theodore M. Hankin
Attorney at Law/C.P.A.
1000 Quail Street, Suite 220
Newport Beach, CA 92660

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-219

Dear Mr. Hankin:

This letter confirms the receipt of your August 6, 2002, request for advice regarding the National Latino Peace Officers Association's political action committee. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(3)(B), unless you are an authorized representative of the political action committee for which you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. During a phone conversation with me, you indicated that you were not an authorized representative of this committee. I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 for your review.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[signature: Trish Mayer]
By: Trish Mayer
Political Reform Consultant

Enclosure

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission to Theodore M. Hankin, an attorney at law. The Commission confirms receipt of Mr. Hankin's request for advice regarding the National Latino Peace Officers Association's political action committee. The Commission states that, under California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), unless Mr. Hankin is an authorized representative of the political action committee, the Commission cannot address his questions or provide analysis. Mr. Hankin indicated during a phone conversation that he was not an authorized representative of the committee. The Commission encloses a copy of regulation 18329 for Mr. Hankin's review. Should Mr. Hankin have any additional questions, he should contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660. Sincerely, Luisa Menchaca General Counsel By: Trish Mayer Political Reform Consultant
